title: South Norwood Jazz Club – Jazz On A Summer’s Day
description:
South Norwood Jazz Club – Jazz On A Summer’s Day

An afternoon of Swingin’ classic Jazz at the outdoors Stanley Arts Yard Bar, with a bar serving hot drinks, cold drinks and snacks.

This is an all ages event, both adult and child tickets are available. Babes in arms do not need to be booked a ticket, please only book a child ticket if they require a seat.

Doors 1.30pm

Music from 2pm

Kitty Whitelaw – Vocals

Alex Bryson – Piano

Asaph Tal – Double Bass

Joe Dessauer – Drums

Magnus Pickering – Trumpet

More musicians to be announced!

title: Ties That Bind
description: A series of new works on paper that embody just some of the many women (past and present) I have crossed paths with. Moments captured in passing, encounters that are burned into memory, flashes of personality exploding through outfits, nails, accessories and more.

title: Spiritual Tiik’s Tibetan Sound Bowl Meditation
description: This meditation class will create a deep relaxation allowing you to feel calm and have a clear mind.

title: Life Drawing (Untutored)
description: Stanley Life Drawing is a fortnightly untutored life drawing session with male or female nude models at Stanley Arts.

title: CRoydon Emerging Writers (CREW)
description: CREW (CRoydon Emerging Writers) is a peer-led writers group that is open to all.

title: Hartbeeps
description: The original musical story tellers and creators of multi-sensory play for babies and young children, you have arrived in the right place and are in great hands.

title: Cherrystars Performing Arts
description: Cherrystars are an award-winning, community performing arts school. Their team consists of BRIT School alumni and professional television and theatre actors who specialise in teaching innovative performing arts classes to the early years.
